feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Fiori
feed.subtitle: SAP Fiori Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Scaling is not working in SAP OVP Table card
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have developed an SAP OVP application using annotations, and I’m currently facing an issue with the sap.ovp.cards.table template. Specifically, the scaling of numeric values is not working as expected. Despite applying the relevant annotations, the card displays the full amount instead of the scaled value.
Below is the annotation I’ve used. Could anyone guide me on how to resolve this issue or suggest what might be missing?

Thank you in advance for your support!

Abdul

<Annotation Term="UI.DataPoint" Qualifier="Balance">
<Record Type="UI.DataPointType">
<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="BalanceAmount"/>
<PropertyValue Property="Title" String=""/>
<PropertyValue Property="ValueFormat">
<Record Type="UI.NumberFormat">
<PropertyValue Property="ScaleFactor" Decimal="1000"/>
<PropertyValue Property="NumberOfFractionalDigits" Int="2"/>
</Record>
</PropertyValue>
</Record>
</Annotation>
<Annotation Term="UI.LineItem" Qualifier="TestQualifier">
<Collection>
<Record Type="UI.DataField">
<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="Customer Group"/>
<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="CustomerCategoryText"/>
</Record>
<Record Type="UI.DataFieldForAnnotation">
<PropertyValue Property="Target" AnnotationPath="@UI.DataPoint#Balance"/>
</Record>
</Collection>
</Annotation> ​

entry.title: SAP Fiori ALP - Visual Filter does not work when many records
entry.content:
Hi Community!

I am having a problem with Fiori Analytical List Page (ALP).

I created a project to display some charts based on the data we have (Dumps), it starts working properly with a small amount of data, however when the data is more realistic it starts failing. For example: Less than 200 records. Everything is working fine!



More than 200 records: Visual Filters does not load any more and above 700 records approx the main chart does not load anymore.



I am learning about this technology, so I am not sure what the problem is

I was thinking in maybe limit these charts to the top N values

Visual Filter: Top 3-5 or Last 5 records.
Bar Chart: Top 20 records

But not sure if that will help me to solve it and also I don't know if is possible.

Thanks!

entry.title: If I click back button or exit from the FIORI tile, an error occurs.
entry.content:
Dear. Every one

I carried out FIORI Embedded work.
After Embedded, an error message appears when you click the back button or the Exit button to return to the home screen from the FIORI tile.
Click the error message to bring the screen back to home.

Error Message

A back-end error has caused the application to terminate. Error message returned:
HTTP 0

entry.title: Purchase Requisition items not showing My Inbox Fiori
entry.content:
Dear SAP experts,

I'm implementing My Inbox after upgrading to SAP S4/HANA 2023.

I can't get the purchase requisitions items to appear in the app My Inbox 
I'm using Workflow WS20000077 with task TS20000159.

I implemented a note 3289039 - Missing item data in Purchase Requisition approval - SAP S/4HANA 2022 onward  and the following appears:

 

 

I maintain the settings before applying the note, and the header appears, but not the items.

 

I also followed the steps in this post.
Details of PR not showing on MY Fiori Inbox SAP S4/HANA 
Where I added and activated workflow WS20000077 in transaction SWETYPV.

And I checked task TS01800239 in SWFVISU

 

Thank you very much.
Regards,

entry.title: How to exclude parent facet label from validation message path in SAP Fiori Elements annotations?
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,
I'm working on an SAP Fiori Elements application using CAP with CDS annotations to define UI facets. I have a nested facet structure like this:

Facets: [
  {
    $Type  : 'UI.CollectionFacet',
    Label  : '{i18n>Details}',
    ID     : 'DetailsProgramFacet',
    Facets : [
      {
        $Type  : 'UI.CollectionFacet',
        Label  : '{i18n>ProgramOverview}',
        ID     : 'ProgramDetailsFacet',
        Facets : [
          {
            $Type  : 'UI.ReferenceFacet',
            Label  : '{i18n>DetailsProgram}',
            Target : '@UI.FieldGroup#ProgramDetailsHeaderFacets'
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
]

In the ProgramDetailsHeaderFacets field group, I have a required field like Name. When this field is left empty, the Fiori Elements framework shows the validation message as:

Program Details, Program Overview
'Program Name' is a required field.

However, I want the message to show only:

Program Overview
'Program Name' is a required field.

The reason I want to exclude the "Program Details" part from the error message is because of how Fiori guidelines render facets depending on context:

In draft mode, the "Program Overview" section is shown directly (no dropdown), because it is the only facet under DetailsProgramFacet. But in active mode, additional facets are added dynamically in the frontend under DetailsProgramFacet, which causes the dropdown to appear with "Program Details" as the top-level section.

This means:

  • In draft programs, users see just the "Program Overview" section.

But the error message still says "Program Details, Program Overview", which feels confusing and inconsistent with what users see.

Problem:

I cannot remove or rename the Program Details facet, as it is reused elsewhere in the app. I’ve tried:

  • Removing the label from the Program Details facet — but this results in ", Program Overview. Name is a required field" (unlabeled path with a leading comma).

  • Setting the label to an empty string via i18n — but the comma still shows up.

  • Exploring @ui.Hidden annotations — these don't influence the label resolution in error messages.

❓ Question:

Is there a supported or recommended way to exclude a specific parent facet label from the validation message path, or to flatten/override the path shown in validation errors, while keeping the facet structure intact?

Any insight, workaround, or UI adaptation technique is appreciated.

entry.title: How to Configuration Approval PR in Fiori My Inbox
entry.content:
Hi All,

How to configure PR approval steps in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, so that all PR approvals appear in Fiori My Inbox?

Thanks

entry.title: "DFF Generation Error in SAP TM FIORI 2023"
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

After upgrading to SAP TM FIORI 2023, I'm facing an issue when posting a DFF freight cost.

The freight charge calculation schema includes a percentage-based condition using the scale FRT_%_VLR_MERC. During processing, the system ends up calculating a negative final amount, which triggers the following error:

  • Save Cancelled
    Enter reference-from line and reference-to line for charge line 920
    Line no. 920: Charge type FRT_%_VLR_MERC can't have a negative value."

It seems that the system is not validating or handling cases where the base value used in the percentage calculation results in a negative amount.

Has anyone run into a similar problem after the 2023 update?
#SAPTM2023 #FIORI2023

entry.title: How to add a new input / selection to an existing Dialog box that has already been extended?
entry.content:
Hello,

I have been tasked with extending a Fiori app with an adaptation project. The app I am looking into is "Find Maintenance Orders and Operation" (F2173).

I am trying to add a new input / selection to a dialog box that opens when a user presses "Change Assignment". This dialog is part of an extension that was created by SAP. I want to be able to add another field to the fragment using a new extension but nothing new seems to display in the dialogue box. I would also need to extend the project with a controller but the override methods that are included in the controller extension (onInit, onBeforeRendering, onAfterRendering, etc.) do not get triggered during the press of the button. The method that handles the button within the SAP logic is called "onChangeAssignmentPressed" which is also part of a controller extension by SAP. Ideally we would want to override that method but is that even possible? If not, How else can we go about this by getting the additional section in our fragment extension to work with a possible new method that would somehow reach the logic that handles the existing "Change Assignment" button? 

When the user presses the "Change Assignment" button, a dialog box is displayed with selections in which we would like to another one in this window for "Division".

 

I have noticed that the app utilizes Function Imports which we are not really familiar with but it seems like we would need to add division here as well but these are not allowed to be changed. How do we proceed without being able to make a change here (not sure if needed)?

 

The existing XML logic for the SAP extension regarding the change assignment dialog box is this:

<core:FragmentDefinition xmlns="sap.m" xmlns:core="sap.ui.core" xmlns:smartform="sap.ui.comp.smartform"
  xmlns:smartfield="sap.ui.comp.smartfield" xmlns:layout="sap.ui.layout" id="ChangeAssignmentFragment"
  xmlns:customData="http://schemas.sap.com/sapui5/extension/sap.ui.core.CustomData/1">
  <Dialog title="{@i18n>xbut.changeAssignment}" contentWidth="20em" id="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentDialog" afterOpen="afterDialogOpened" afterClose="afterDialogClosed">
    <content>
      <smartform:SmartForm flexEnabled="false" editTogglable="false" editable="true" id="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentSmartForm">
        <smartform:layout>
          <smartform:Layout id="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentLayout" columnsL="1" columnsM="1" emptySpanL="1" emptySpanM="0" labelSpanL="0" labelSpanM="0"></smartform:Layout>
        </smartform:layout>
        <smartform:groups>
          <smartform:Group id="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentGroup">
            <smartform:GroupElement objectBindings="{viewModel>/Operationworkcenter}" id="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmenWorkCenterGroupElement">
              <smartform:label>
                <Label text="{/#ChangeAssignmentInputType/Operationworkcenter/@sap:label}" id="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmenWorkCenterLabel"/>
              </smartform:label>
              <ComboBox visible="{= ${viewModel>/isMassEdit} && !${viewModel>isSingleMode} }"
                id="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentWorkCenterMassEditComboBox" change="onMassEditComboBoxChanged" selectedKey="{viewModel>selectedKey}"
                items="{viewModel>massEditValues}" customData:smartFieldId="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentWorkCenterField">
                <items>
                  <core:Item key="{viewModel>key}" id="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentWorkCenterMassEditItem" text="{viewModel>value}"/>
                </items>
              </ComboBox>
              <smartfield:SmartField visible="{= !${viewModel>/isMassEdit} || ${viewModel>isSingleMode} }"
                id="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentWorkCenterField" value="{Operationworkcenter}"/>
            </smartform:GroupElement>
            <smartform:GroupElement id="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentPlantGroupElement" objectBindings="{viewModel>/Plant}">
              <smartform:label>
                <Label text="{/#ChangeAssignmentInputType/Plant/@sap:label}" id="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentPlantLabel"/>
              </smartform:label>
              <ComboBox visible="{= ${viewModel>/isMassEdit} && !${viewModel>isSingleMode} }"
                id="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentPlantMassEditComboBox" change="onMassEditComboBoxChanged" selectedKey="{viewModel>selectedKey}"
                items="{viewModel>massEditValues}" customData:smartFieldId="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentPlantField">
                <items>
                  <core:Item key="{viewModel>key}" id="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentPlantMassEditItem" text="{viewModel>value}"/>
                </items>
              </ComboBox>
              <smartfield:SmartField visible="{= !${viewModel>/isMassEdit} || ${viewModel>isSingleMode} }"
                id="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentPlantField" value="{Plant}"/>
            </smartform:GroupElement>
            <smartform:GroupElement id="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentResponsibleGroupElement" objectBindings="{viewModel>/Operationpersonresponsible}">
              <smartform:label>
                <Label id="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentResponsibleLabel" text="{/#ChangeAssignmentInputType/Operationpersonresponsible/@sap:label}"/>
              </smartform:label>
              <ComboBox visible="{= ${viewModel>/isMassEdit} && !${viewModel>isSingleMode} }"
                id="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentPersonResponsibleMassEditComboBox" change="onMassEditComboBoxChanged"
                selectedKey="{viewModel>selectedKey}" items="{viewModel>massEditValues}"
                customData:smartFieldId="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentPersonResponsibleField">
                <items>
                  <core:Item key="{viewModel>key}" id="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentPersonResponsibleMassEditItem" text="{viewModel>value}"/>
                </items>
              </ComboBox>
              <smartfield:SmartField visible="{= !${viewModel>/isMassEdit} || ${viewModel>isSingleMode} }"
                id="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentPersonResponsibleField" value="{Operationpersonresponsible}"/>
            </smartform:GroupElement>
          </smartform:Group>
        </smartform:groups>
      </smartform:SmartForm>
    </content>
    <beginButton>
      <Button id="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentOkButton" text="{@i18n>xbut.changeAssignment}" press="onOkPressed" type="Emphasized" />
    </beginButton>
    <endButton>
      <Button id="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentCancelButton" text="{@i18n>xbut.cancel}" press="onCancelPressed"/>
    </endButton>
  </Dialog>
</core:FragmentDefinition>

Within my new fragment I attempted to add:

<core:FragmentDefinition xmlns="sap.m" xmlns:core="sap.ui.core" xmlns:smartform="sap.ui.comp.smartform"
    xmlns:smartfield="sap.ui.comp.smartfield" xmlns:layout="sap.ui.layout" id="ChangeAssignmentFragment"
    xmlns:customData="http://schemas.sap.com/sapui5/extension/sap.ui.core.CustomData/1">
    <Dialog title="{@i18n>xbut.changeAssignment}" contentWidth="20em" id="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentDialog" afterOpen="afterDialogOpened" afterClose="afterDialogClosed">
        <content>
            <smartform:SmartForm flexEnabled="false" editTogglable="false" editable="true" id="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentSmartForm">
                <smartform:layout>
                    <smartform:Layout id="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentLayout" columnsL="1" columnsM="1" emptySpanL="1" emptySpanM="0" labelSpanL="0" labelSpanM="0"></smartform:Layout>
                </smartform:layout>
                <smartform:groups>
                    <smartform:Group id="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentGroup">
                        <smartform:GroupElement id="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentDivisionGroupElement" objectBindings="{viewModel>/zzdivision}">
                            <smartform:label>
                                <Label id="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentDivisionLabel" text="Division"/>
                                <!-- <Label id="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentDivisionLabel" text="{/#ChangeAssignmentInputType/zzdivision/@sap:label}"/> -->
                            </smartform:label>
                            <ComboBox visible="{= ${viewModel>/isMassEdit} && !${viewModel>isSingleMode} }"
                                id="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentDivisionMassEditComboBox" change="onMassEditComboBoxChanged"
                                selectedKey="{viewModel>selectedKey}" items="{viewModel>massEditValues}"
                                customData:smartFieldId="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentDivisionField">
                                <items>
                                    <core:Item key="{viewModel>key}" id="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentDivisionMassEditItem" text="{viewModel>value}"/>
                                </items>
                            </ComboBox>
                            <smartfield:SmartField visible="{= !${viewModel>/isMassEdit} || ${viewModel>isSingleMode} }"
                                id="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentDivisionField" value="{zzdivision}"/>
                        </smartform:GroupElement>
                    </smartform:Group>
                </smartform:groups>
            </smartform:SmartForm>
        </content>
    </Dialog>
</core:FragmentDefinition>

I would appreciate any feedback that would help us keep moving forward. Please let me know if any additional details are needed. 

Thank you,

Patrick

entry.title: Error when deploying simple Fiori Elements app
entry.content:
Hello,

I am doing the Developing and Extending SAP Fiori Elements Apps course from learning.sap.com. In week 3 unit 4 "Deploying your SAP Fiori elements app", when I execute:

 

npx fiori add deploy-config

 

And select Cloud Foundry, instead of going to the next step, I get the following:

 

Adding deploy-config to the project.
info Add:Deploy-config Using: /fiori:deploy-config
? Please choose the target Cloud Foundry

No change to package.json was detected. No package manager install will be executed.

 

I don't know what is causing this. I had to download Yeoman as a dependency before executing this command, maybe it has to do with that or with npm. My package.json file:

{
  "name": "bookinganalysis",
  "version": "0.0.1",
  "description": "An SAP Fiori application.",
  "keywords": [
    "ui5",
    "openui5",
    "sapui5"
  ],
  "main": "webapp/index.html",
  "devDependencies": {
    "@sap-ux/ui5-middleware-fe-mockserver": "2",
    "@sap/ux-ui5-tooling": "1",
    "@ui5/cli": "^3.0.0"
  },
  "scripts": {
    "start": "fiori run --open \"test/flp.html#app-preview\"",
    "start-local": "fiori run --config ./ui5-local.yaml --open \"test/flp.html#app-preview\"",
    "build": "ui5 build --config=ui5.yaml --clean-dest --dest dist",
    "start-mock": "fiori run --config ./ui5-mock.yaml --open \"test/flp.html#app-preview\"",
    "deploy": "fiori verify",
    "deploy-config": "fiori add deploy-config",
    "start-noflp": "fiori run --open \"index.html?sap-ui-xx-viewCache=false\"",
    "start-variants-management": "fiori run --open \"preview.html#app-preview\""
  },
  "sapuxLayer": "CUSTOMER_BASE",
  "sapux": true
}

entry.title: How to get the link to an Odata service when creating a Fiori elements course ?
entry.content: Trying to follow a tutorial but not sure where to get this link ? Kindly assist

entry.title: Fiori app - Maintain Business Partner; In identification tab can we increase number of rows visible
entry.content: Hi Experts, S/4 by default only displays 5 rows in the Identification Numbers under Identification tab. Is there a way I can make this default to 10.

entry.title: Issue in Creating SAP Fiori Elements List Report Using Parameterized CDS View using OData V4 UI
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are currently developing a Fiori Elements List Report based on a parameterized CDS view in RAP. We have created a parameterized consumption CDS view and binding it using an OData V4 UI service. 

While generating the Fiori Elements List Report application, only the parameters are visible in the App as output fields, and no filters are available. While executing it, we are getting the below error.

 

Below is the CDS View which is created. The parameters are exposed from the base level CDS

@AbapCatalog.viewEnhancementCategory: [#NONE]
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'Consumption View for Proj Fin Report'
@Metadata.ignorePropagatedAnnotations: true
@ObjectModel.usageType:{
    serviceQuality: #X,
    sizeCategory: #S,
    dataClass: #MIXED
}
@Metadata.allowExtensions: true
@VDM.viewType: #CONSUMPTION
define view entity ZPTD_C_PROJ_FIN_REP
  with parameters
    p_bukrs      : bukrs,
    p_perio_from : co_perio,
    p_perio_to   : co_perio,
    p_gjahr_from : gjahr,
    p_gjahr_to   : gjahr,
    p_pc1        : versn,
    p_pc2        : versn
  as select from ZPTD_I_PROJ_FIN_REP( p_bukrs:$parameters.p_bukrs,
                                      p_perio_from:$parameters.p_perio_from ,
                                      p_perio_to:$parameters.p_perio_to ,
                                      p_gjahr_from:$parameters.p_gjahr_from ,
                                      p_gjahr_to:$parameters.p_gjahr_to,
                                      p_pc1:$parameters.p_pc1 ,
                                      p_pc2:$parameters.p_pc2  )
{

While creating an OData V2 service, it is working, and the report is showing all the filters and data is displayed.

Is there any workaround to achieve this using OData V4? We are on S4HANA OP2023 version.

Thanks,

Faiz

entry.title: On Navigation of the itemObject page I wanted to clear the value set of the Macro filter.
entry.content:
We have defined macro filter in the fragment 

 while navigating from one item page to another in the treetable I wanted to clear the macro filter which defined inside the item object page is being cached for other item set  .
 
Below is the code i have wrote. but it is not working for onbeforeBinding if I am calling, if i wrote separate custom action and call the same method it will clear the macro filter .
I suspect do i am doing something wrong with onBeforeBinding .
 
 
routing: {

                /**
                 * Lifecycle hook triggered before binding the view to a new context.
                 * Used here to reset the filter bar state by clearing any existing selections,
                 * ensuring a clean slate for each navigation to this view.
                 *
                 * @Param {Object} oContext - The context object for the upcoming binding.
                 */
                onAfterBinding  : function (oContext) {
                    this.onPressClear();
                }


            }
 
onPressClear: function(){
var oView = this.getView();
var filterBar = oView.byId("ismm.pps.purchasecontracts1::PPS_PurchaseContractItemObjectPage--fe::CustomSubSection::ItemPricingSimulation--idItemPriceSimulateFilterBar");
filterBar.setSelectionVariant(new SelectionVariant());
},

entry.title: Configuring Functional Area for Universal Allocations Fiori Apps
entry.content: I would like to configure field RFAREA Functional Area to be a receiver option when using Universal Allocations Fiori Applications. I have changed the configuration in table V_T811I in order for it to be an option when choosing a receiver in the apps. It's now showing up as an option, but I am getting the error "Field use for mandatory field RFAREA is not maintained correctly (T811I)". The only thing I changed was making it an option as a receiver in the "Field usage in allocation" section in that field's entry in T811I. I have tried changing the configuration to match profit center which is a standard option, and that has not worked either. Any suggestions on how field RFAREA Functional Area should be used in order to use it as a receiver in the Fiori Apps?

entry.title: Diff VHPs for same property in Listreport and object page. SAPUI5 v1.71.74
entry.content:
Im working in SAPUI5 version 1.71.74.I want diff VHPs for same property in Listreport and object page. Also for Object page alone i wnat to send an additional constant input filter.

Valuehelpparameterconstant will not work for me since it is not supported in my Version.

Any ideas on how to go about this?

entry.title: Error Deploying BSP App to S4 Hana Backend error message: No default virus profile active or found.
entry.content: Hi Community, I am trying to deploy BSP app to S4 HANA system via Business Application Studio, After entering Credentials I am getting the below error. how to resolve and deploy without any error.

entry.title: Error on syncing html5 application to content channel
entry.content:
Hi,

I am unable to sync sample apps to content explorer. Below is the error when download the report. I am not sure where to change this.

First, i successfully uploaded my sample application thru BAS.

Then after upload, i navigated to workzone and manually clicked ng Update content button : 

But the application did not appear in the Content Explorer

So i go back to Content Channel and downloaded the report

 

"status": "PARTIAL","contents": { "total": 13, "failed": 1, "status": "PARTIAL", "messages": { "com.sap.mybankdetails": { "error": [ "com.sap.mybankdetails of type: businessapp does not match the schema, dataPath: undefined, message: 'must be equal to one of the allowed values' [ 'OData', 'ODataAnnotation', 'INA', 'XML', 'JSON', 'FHIR', 'http', 'WebSocket' ]" ], "warning": [] } }, "correlationId": "6dae81e3-7dfd-4b1f-7818-c1cc3d5ba917" }

I am really stuck on this.

entry.title: Calling the sap ui5 fiori application as pop up from button click event
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Calling the sap ui5 fiori application as pop up from button click event.

Requirement: Development of one sap ui5 application that should be called from masthead by development button besides "go" in the sap portal 7.5 in the button click.

Can sap ui5 application be integrated in the masthead area of the sap portal as button event or hyperlink?

Thanks

Kaushik

SAP Portal/UI5/Fiori

entry.title: Tree Table loads data only in client operationModeand not in server operationMode
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

 

I am developing a tree table with basic odata binding and tree annotations(same as given in SDK). However in my case  data is shown only when I use operationMode:'Client'.

 need to filter data based on some Phases, but with  operationMode : client, the filter is ignored.

And when I use operationMode:Server, data is fetched from the backend ,but the table appers blank.

Please find below the xml code -

 <TreeTable id="TreeTableBasic" rowActionCount="1" rows="{

            path : '/MasterscreenSet',      

            parameters : {

            countMode: 'Inline',

            operationMode:'Client',

            numberOfExpandedLevels: '{helperJson>/numberOfExpandedLevels}',

                treeAnnotationProperties : {

                    hierarchyLevelFor : 'HierarchyLevel',

                    hierarchyNodeFor : 'NodeID',

                    hierarchyParentNodeFor : 'ParentNodeID',

                    hierarchyDrillStateFor : 'DrillState'

                }

            }

        }"

        enableSelectAll="false" selectionMode="None" ariaLabelledBy="title" class="teamTableText" rowMode="Interactive" enableBusyIndicator="true"

        busyIndicatorDelay="0" dataReceived="onDataReceived">

Thanks & Regards,

Aastha

SAPUI5 OData  SAP Fiori Makers

entry.title: No Attachments in Screen Maintenance Requests Fiori App
entry.content:
Hi Folks,

I have created maintenance notifications along with attachments via custom code. The attachments are successfully visible in the IW22 transaction, and corresponding entries exist in the TOA01 table.

However, when accessing the same notification through the Fiori app "Screen Maintenance Requests" (App ID: F4072), the attachments are not displayed.

Has anyone encountered a similar issue or is aware of a potential resolution? Any guidance on how to ensure attachments appear correctly in the Fiori app would be greatly appreciated.
